title: Home Patient Care Mission and Vision
content:
Home Patient Care Mission and Vision

Mission:

Based on the principles of our university, in the axis of continuous change and development brought by the information society, with the knowledge, skills and responsibility awareness required by the Home Patient Care program, closely following scientific developments, innovative individuals who are prone to team work in the protection and promotion of health, can carry out patient care applications at home. is to make him gain his life.

Vision:

Education, training and research institution, which is preferred in the health sector in the training of Home Patient Care technicians, in the production and use of knowledge and skills, creates awareness in cooperation with stakeholders, contributes to science and social development, plays a leading role in the field of education and training at the national and international level. it is to be.
